exemplar.title: How can we know that current knowledge is an improvement upon past knowledge?

detailedExemplarData.title: How can we know that current knowledge is an improvement upon past knowledge?

strengths: Clear identification of three specific real-world objects with authentic contexts.
Consistent, explicit linkage of each object to the IA prompt using relevant statistical and technical evidence.
Strong use of quantitative data for VAR and detailed technical description of the HEPA filter.
Prompt is prominently stated, providing clear focus for the exhibition.
weaknesses: Analysis sometimes lacks conceptual depth and critical examination of how evidence supports broader TOK concepts.
Repetitive phrasing in object summaries weakens overall cohesion and unity.
Inconsistent citation formatting reduces scholarly rigor.
Final reflections do not fully integrate the three cases into a cohesive argument about knowledge change.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The exhibition clearly meets the requirements of the 7â8 band: it selects three specific objects, situates them in recognisable real-world contexts, and makes strong, evidence-based links to the prompt. Statistical data on VAR accuracy, expert commentary on RFID tags, and comparative HEPA-filter performance demonstrate purposeful use of evidence rather than mere description. However, the analysis falls short of the sustained insight needed for the top band (9â10). Key TOK concepts such as reliability of evidence and criteria for judging improvement are asserted rather than critically unpacked. There is some repetition across sections, citation styles are inconsistent, and the concluding reflections do not fully synthesise the three cases into a unified epistemic argument. On balance, the work exhibits solid achievement corresponding to a score of 7 in the 7â8 band.

annotations.comment: The IA prompt is prominently stated, providing clear focus for the exhibition and anchoring the analysis well.
The description of knowledge in sports officiating is vague; the student should clarify what constitutes âknowledgeâ in this context and link it explicitly to decision-making processes.
The sentence ends abruptly and leaves the example incomplete; the student should finish the case description to show how this instance affects the understanding of VARâs reliability.
Citation formatting for footnotes is inconsistent; standardize style (e.g., APA or MLA) throughout to enhance credibility and scholarly rigor.
The error example is described narratively but not used to deepen the analysis of knowledge improvement; integrate this case into a broader TOK discussion on criteria for âbetterâ knowledge.
The concluding summary restates that VAR improves accuracy but lacks critical reflection on underlying epistemic assumptions; probe why accuracy equates to âbetterâ knowledge.
The standalone word-count statement interrupts flow; relocate or hide within metadata to keep focus on content.
The real-world context of the RFID tag is described but the link to the IA prompt is not explicit; explain how user experience with tolls reflects changes in knowledge.
Evidence from Dr. Rosli Azad Khan is presented descriptively; deepen analysis by discussing its implications for evaluating technological âimprovementâ in epistemic terms.
The summary claims RFID tags have âlittle impactâ but this assertion lacks quantitative or sourced support; incorporate data or user surveys to justify the claim.
The concluding line âdrivers can judge effectivenessâ is a broad assertion; ask how personal experience aligns with objective measures of system improvement.
The HEPA filter description is clear and grounded in technical detail, effectively illustrating why it represents an improvement over earlier filters.
The discussion of fiberglass risks remains descriptive; connect these health concerns back to how they affect judgments of âimprovementâ in air-purification knowledge.
Footnote citations 7â8 repeat the same source; ensure references are distinct or consolidate to avoid redundancy.
The summary of HEPA performance is concise but does not integrate the three objects into a unified argument about knowledge change; add a bridging reflection.
The metadata shows the total word count prominently; consider relocating to a cover sheet or appendix to maintain narrative flow.
Bibliographic entries vary in style and completeness; adopt a consistent format (e.g., APA) and include all required details (publisher, date, URL).
Entries 1 and 2 are football-focused; consider balancing with more TOK methodology sources to support conceptual analysis.
The broken URL fragments on page 8 disrupt access to sources; ensure all links are complete and functional.
Overall, the student successfully selects three tangible objects with authentic contexts that address the prompt, demonstrating solid achievement in the 7â8 band.
Repetition in concluding sentences across objects weakens cohesion; tailor each summary to highlight distinct epistemic insights.
The student effectively leverages statistical evidence for VAR, demonstrating solidity in support of claims about accuracy improvements.
While each object is justified individually, the final reflections should synthesize insights to address the central question holistically.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content:
The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not

trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
